expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Navigation tab 'Hot Gar' is truncated and should read 'Hot Games'. The text is cut off on the right side.
Game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections appear to be partially cut off on the right edge of the screen. The rightmost game card is not fully visible.

expected.reasoning: Neither reported issue describes a problem with the Casino icon in the bottom navigation bar; they address text truncation and game card visibility instead.
